title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Byju's International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Byju's International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Byju's International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Byju's International Enterprises:
Byju's International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's International Enterprises!
